name: brave-frontier-legacy-save-studio
description: Editor desktop offline e seguro para saves de Brave Frontier: Legacy.
author: Legacy Save Studio Community

scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -k "next dev --webpack" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && cross-env ELECTRON_DEV_URL=http://localhost:3000 electron ."
scripts.build:portable: npm run build && powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/build-portable.ps1
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test tests/editor-core.test.mjs tests/electron-file-service.test.cjs tests/browser-file-service.test.mjs tests/i18n.test.mjs tests/ci-workflow.test.mjs tests/catalog-mode.test.mjs
scripts.eval: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test tests/editor-eval.test.mjs tests/browser-file-service-eval.test.mjs tests/version-tag-eval.test.mjs tests/workspace-root-eval.test.mjs tests/catalog-mode-eval.test.mjs
scripts.dist: npm run test && npm run eval && npm run build:portable
